items.title: European Union strikes deal to ban sexualised AI deepfakes
items.summary: "Today, the EU has drawn a red line. AI must never be used to humiliate, exploit or endanger people. For the first time, EU legislation explicitly bans nudifier applications," c...

items.title: 11 Best Sunscreens, WIRED Tested and Reviewed
items.summary: We put 36 sunscreens to the test during summer hikes, spring ski days, and beachside hangs. Out of all the mineral, chemical, and spray varieties we tried, these are our top picks.
